rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 6/10 and rest on the same core assessment: solid software development experience but gaps in agentic AI architecture and engineering leadership at scale. The differences in the strengths and concerns lists are reworded emphasis shifts within ordinary run-to-run variance (e.g., fintech surfaces as a strength in one and a gap in the other), with no new penalty, lowered score, or reasoning that keys off the name or gender change.
